\//o\/\//o//\//o//\//\o//\projects

open knit tools index

Since the start of this project, we have been collecting a collaborative index of open-source knit design software. The aim of this is to both collate resources for different practicioners to use, and to map the landscape of knit tools.

The index is openly-editable, contributions are welcome!
